case_title: HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. ALMA P PACLIBAR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR 27, 2018 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, AND IN OPEN COURT, THE COURT GRANTS AND RENDERED THE JUDGMENT. JUDGE CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACLIBAR, ALMA P $2,640.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,681.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,471.59 AS TO DEFENDANT PACLIBAR, ALMA P

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,640.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. AS TO DEFENDANT PACLIBAR, ALMA P ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. AS TO DEFENDANT PACLIBAR, ALMA P
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$41.00) SERVED FEB-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PACLIBAR, ALMA P
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $501.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $85.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT PACLIBAR, ALMA P
